project_type: Next.js 16 App Router with Prisma ORM and SQLite, programmatic SEO site
build_system: npm with Next.js build. Build command includes prisma generate. No Makefile or Docker.
test_framework: None - no test files exist in the project
test_command: No test command configured - verify with build only
verification_instructions: Run npm run build to verify all pages compile and static generation succeeds. Check for TypeScript errors. The build generates 609+ static pages.
snapshot_or_generated_files: prisma/dev.db is the SQLite database committed to git. Generated by running npm run seed (requires network access to AniList API). The .next/ directory is gitignored.
setup_instructions: npm install && npx prisma generate. Database already exists at prisma/dev.db.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network mode. Node.js 22 available via nvm. No Docker needed. SQLite DB is bundled in prisma/dev.db. Deployed on Vercel free tier - must keep SQLite approach. AGENTS.md warns that Next.js 16 has breaking changes from training data - check node_modules/next/dist/docs/ for API reference.
contribution_requirements: AGENTS.md instructs to read node_modules/next/dist/docs/ before writing code and heed deprecation notices. The project uses TailwindCSS 4 (imported as @import 'tailwindcss' in globals.css with @theme inline block). Uses Next.js App Router with async params (params is a Promise that must be awaited).
key_patterns: 1) Server Components by default, 'use client' for interactivity. 2) Prisma queries directly in server components. 3) TailwindCSS 4 with dark theme (bg-gray-950 base). 4) AnimeCard component is the reusable card. 5) Content generation in src/lib/content-generator.ts. 6) ISR with revalidate exports. 7) Pages use generateStaticParams for SSG. 8) Route params are Promise<{slug: string}> that must be awaited. 9) Image domains configured in next.config.ts (s4.anilist.co, img.anili.st, cdn.myanimelist.net).
directory_structure: src/app/ - App Router pages (anime/[slug], genre/[genre], year/[year], anime-like/[slug]). src/components/ - Shared components (Header, Footer, AnimeCard, Breadcrumbs, AdBanner). src/lib/ - Utilities (prisma client, anilist API, content generator, filler data). scripts/ - seed.ts for populating DB. prisma/ - schema.prisma and dev.db.
